title: Translation Of A South American Ode
content:
In all my Enna's beauties blest,
    Amidst profusion still I pine;
    For though she gives me up her breast,
    Its panting tenant is not mine.
meaning:
"Translation Of A South American Ode" is a quintessential example of Oliver Goldsmith's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
